title: INF-6 Abliteration provenance + license tagging + Skill Bank gating
goal: Wire the abliterated output through the §4.8 content-review pipeline: PII scan, license tagging validation, provenance metadata enforcement. Output cannot be referenced from the Skill Bank without passing review per AC-ABLITERATION-OFFLINE.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/distillation/abliterate_review.rs; integration with §4.8 content review (cluster D MT-120); tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-106 abliteration tool + MT-120 distillation content review merged. If MT-120 not yet authored by other agent at sequencing time, this MT may use a stub content_review_check until the real pipeline lands; document the placeholder.
implementation_notes: Per AC-ABLITERATION-OFFLINE: "passes through §4.8 content-review pipeline (PII scan + license tagging + provenance) before any Skill Bank reference". Implementation: AbliterationOutputReview::check(artifact_path: &Path, provenance: &AbliterationProvenance) -> Result<ReviewResult, ReviewError>. Steps: (1) verify provenance metadata complete (base_model_sha256, refusal_direction_sha256, license_tag non-empty, operator_signature present); (2) call distillation::content_review::pii_scan on the artifact-level metadata text (not weights themselves; weights are not PII); (3) verify license_tag is in the allowed-licenses list (operator-configurable; defaults: MIT, Apache-2.0, custom_internal); (4) emit FR-EVT-DISTILL-ABLITERATE-REVIEW { artifact_path, result: Pass|Fail, reason }; (5) on pass, allow registration as a Skill Bank model entry; on fail, quarantine (move artifact to .quarantine/ subdirectory and emit warn). Skill Bank gating: kernel.skill_bank.register_abliterated_model action checks AbliterationOutputReview::check first; refuses on Fail. Tests: provenance missing field -> Fail; license_tag empty -> Fail; license_tag not in allowed list -> Fail; complete provenance + allowed license -> Pass.
risk_if_missed: Abliterated outputs skip content review; spec §4.7.4 + AC-ABLITERATION-OFFLINE Skill-Bank gate not enforced.
validator_focus: Provenance completeness gate; license allowlist; quarantine on fail; Skill Bank registration refuses on Fail.

minimum_controls: Quarantine on Fail (do not delete artifact).
